title: raffaelefarinaro/ciaobot
summary: Ciaobot is an opinionated interface for using Claude Code and/or Codex as a personal assistant and second brain. It is a local web app around agentic work: chats, projects, files, schedules, memory, and archived knowledge all live in one interface instead of being scattered across terminal sessions.

title: drplatforms/health-fitness-platform
summary: Local-first health and fitness platform with grounded AI meal generation, nutrition and barcode logging, recipes, recovery intelligence, workout execution, and adaptive progression.

title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 182 + rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: luisquintanilla/magenticbrain-vllm-aspire
summary: Run microsoft/MagenticBrain (14B) locally on GPU via vLLM (Docker), orchestrated with .NET Aspire + the aichatweb RAG template.

title: jgoy-labs/server-nexe
summary: Local AI server with persistent memory, RAG, and multi-backend inference (MLX / llama.cpp / Ollama). Runs entirely on your machine — zero data sent to external services.

summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: The whole local AI stack in one executable: it runs and manages local AI models across every GPU, and it's a search engine you can talk to, with cited answers from your files, code, and the web. MCP server for coding agents, web crawler, TUI, CLI, REST API, Python library. No Ollama or LM Studio needed, works with both.

title: richhabits/sam
summary: A free, private, local-first AI assistant that actually does the work — 167 tools, a team of 78 AI agents, 40 rotating free AI brains, 25 skills. Not a chatbot, a doer. It doesn't just answer — it handles it.

title: EBay1992/atlas

title: hysel/haven-42
summary: Haven 42 is an evidence-gated, local-first AI workbench for coding, chat, and media on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

title: Aseiel/VideoHighlighter
summary: Open-source local AI video analyzer powered by Ollama. Visual search, automatic highlights, scene/action/object detection, audio analysis, and subtitle generation. Free, offline alternative to Twelve Labs, Runway, and Descript.

title: Shishir435/ollama-client
summary: Ollama Client – Chat with Local LLMs Inside Your Browser  A lightweight, privacy‑first Chrome extension to chat with local LLMs via Ollama, LM Studio, and llama.cpp. Supports streaming, stop/regenerate, RAG, and easy model switching — all without cloud APIs or data leaks.

title: jousudo/chatic
summary: Self-hosted, privacy-first multilingual language tutor that lives in WhatsApp. Go single binary, multi-LLM with failover (Gemini/OpenAI/Claude/Ollama), encrypted at rest.
